name: Envelope (DAHDSR)
description: A versatile envelope generator based on the disting EX Quad Envelope algorithm. It is a complex (DAHDSR) envelope generator with various trigger modes including gated, triggered (oneshot) and looping. The envelopes can be synced to clocks (analogue pulses, or MIDI). This algorithm separates the concepts of an envelope shape (its attack etc. times, sustain level) and the envelope generator itself. You can share shapes between the generators.
use_cases: Modulating multiple parts of a monophonic patch
gui_description: The display shows a graphical representation of the envelope(s). If the current parameter is one of the shape parameters, the relevant part of the envelope is highlighted. When there are many envelopes, the display is subdivided into regions for each one.

input_ports.name: Trigger input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope's trigger input.

input_ports.name: Clock input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope's clock input.

input_ports.name: MIDI channel
input_ports.description: The MIDI channel on which notes can trigger the envelope.

input_ports.name: I2C channel
input_ports.description: The I2C channel on which notes can trigger the envelope.

input_ports.name: Note number
input_ports.description: The MIDI or I2C note number that will trigger the envelope, or -1 for Any.

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope's output.

output_ports.name: End of cycle output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope's end of cycle trigger output. Outputs a 5V trigger when the envelope becomes idle.

output_ports.name: Active output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope's active output. Outputs 5V while the envelope is not idle.
